entry.title: New: Bill 78 (Hawaiʻi County) — On agenda 2025-10-08
entry.content:
AMENDS ORDINANCE NO. 25-46, AS AMENDED, RELATING TO PUBLIC IMPROVEMENTS AND FINANCING THEREOF FOR THE FISCAL YEAR JULY 1, 2025, TO JUNE 30, 2026

Adds the Finance Land/Facility Acquisitions Project ($1,150,000) and the Land/Facility Acquisitions – Federal Project ($850,000) to the Capital Budget. Funds for these projects shall be provided from General Obligation Bonds, Capital Projects Fund – Fund Balance and/or other Sources ($1,150,000) and Federal Grants Receivable ($850,000), to acquire land for legally mandated projects and/or County Agency needs.

Latest action: On agenda 2025-10-08

View on the council site
